tasks.prompt:
Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
Role: cover.
Purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance..
Diagram type: stage_evolution.
Concept summary: Mamba-3 这次最关键的变化，不是再讲训练提速，而是把注意力从“怎么更快预训练”转向“怎么在不加推理延迟的前提下，把质量继续往上推”。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: 3-4 stage panels, left-to-right arrows, evolution markers.
Key relationships to visualize: show progression across stages, make the shift in logic visually obvious.
Layout pattern: diagram_left_text_right.
Diagram focus: single central system diagram.
Text position: right.
On-canvas headline: "真正值得盯的不是“Mamba 又更新了”，而是有人开始认真重写推理…".
On-canvas subheadline: "Mamba-3 这次最关键的变化，不是再讲训练提速，而是把注意力从“怎么更快预训练”转…".
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, wide editorial banner, clean empty space, flat shapes with restrained accents, short labels only.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no photorealism, no dense paragraphs in image, no random sci-fi effects.
Additional direction: Turn the article's main judgment into a single visual system. Source context: Gorden_Sun.
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.

Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
Role: inline.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: stage_evolution.
Concept summary: 如果你还在把模型架构升级理解成一场参数和 benchmark 的军备竞赛，那 Mamba-3 这篇博客真正想纠正的，可能正是这种看法。它不是在说“我们又做了个更强版本”，而是在说：当后训练、RL rollout、agent workflow 都开始把推理压力推到天花板附近，架构….
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: 3-4 stage panels, left-to-right arrows, evolution markers.
Key relationships to visualize: show progression across stages, make the shift in logic visually obvious.
Layout pattern: single_concept_centered.
Diagram focus: one section concept.
Text position: integrated.
On-canvas headline: "这次真正值得看的，不是又多了一个新版本号，而是模型架构…".
On-canvas subheadline: "如果你还在把模型架构升级理解成一场参数和 benchmark 的军备竞…".
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons.
Additional direction: Visualize this section's main idea: 这次真正值得看的，不是又多了一个新版本号，而是模型架构….
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.

Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
Role: inline.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: workflow_map.
Concept summary: Mamba-2 当年押注的是训练效率，所以通过大量简化底层状态空间机制，换来了 2 到 8 倍的训练提速。但今天的瓶颈已经不只在预训练。部署、后训练、强化学习 rollout，以及 Codex、Claude Code 这类 agent workflow，都把“推理是不是够便宜、….
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: pipeline blocks, arrows, input/output artifacts, step modules.
Key relationships to visualize: show sequence and handoff, make the operating logic obvious at a glance.
Layout pattern: single_concept_centered.
Diagram focus: one section concept.
Text position: integrated.
On-canvas headline: "Mamba-2 解决的是训练瓶颈，Mamba-3 盯上…".
On-canvas subheadline: "Mamba-2 当年押注的是训练效率，所以通过大量简化底层状态空间机制…".
Use short Chinese labels only: Mamba-2 解决的是训练瓶颈, Mamba-3 盯上的是推理瓶颈.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons.
Additional direction: Visualize this section's main idea: Mamba-2 解决的是训练瓶颈，Mamba-3 盯上的是推理瓶颈.
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.

Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
Role: inline.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: workflow_map.
Concept summary: Mamba-3 的核心价值，不是继续从训练优先的角度调旧结构，而是反过来问：如果今天真正昂贵的是推理，那一个为推理而设计的状态空间模型应该长什么样？博客里给出的结论也很清楚：固定状态带来了线性复杂度，但也要求模型把更多过去信息压缩进同一个表示里。问题不在于谁更高级，而在于当推理….
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: pipeline blocks, arrows, input/output artifacts, step modules.
Key relationships to visualize: show sequence and handoff, make the operating logic obvious at a glance.
Layout pattern: single_concept_centered.
Diagram focus: one section concept.
Text position: integrated.
On-canvas headline: "这篇博客最有价值的，是把架构取舍讲明白了".
On-canvas subheadline: "Mamba-3 的核心价值，不是继续从训练优先的角度调旧结构，而是反过…".
Use short Chinese labels only: 让 recurrence 本身更有表达力, 给 transition matrix…, 在每次更新里加入更多几乎免费的并行工作.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons.
Additional direction: Visualize this section's main idea: 这篇博客最有价值的，是把架构取舍讲明白了.
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
